framing: EXPLORATORY (per 2026-04-19 Phase 0 power finding: MDE > +0.50 ExSharpe > gate threshold 0.20 — gate pre-committed but not strict-applied; point estimates + CIs are the deliverable).
universe: S&P 500 historical membership (Wikipedia + SEC CIK-resolved, survivorship-bias-free with 347-row delistings CSV)

strategies.name: value_earnings_yield
strategies.rationale: Top-decile earnings yield (TTM_NI / shares_out / price). Literature post-decay ~0.10-0.20 ExS.

strategies.name: momentum_252_21
strategies.rationale: Jegadeesh-Titman 12-1 momentum. Literature pre-decay ~0.25-0.35 ExS; post-decay 0.10-0.20.

strategies.name: quality_roe_ttm
strategies.rationale: Top-decile trailing-twelve-month ROE. Literature (Novy-Marx) post-decay ~0.10-0.20 ExS.

strategies.name: lowvol_252d
strategies.rationale: Bottom-decile realized volatility (score = -sigma). Literature pre-decay 0.25-0.35 ExS; robust 1940-2023 per Van Vliet & Blitz.

statistical_treatment.reason_gate_claims_suppressed: Phase 0 empirical MDE > +0.50 > gate threshold; claiming PASS/FAIL would be miscalibrated. Gate CI and holm-adj p are reported for audit but the narrative is point estimates + regime stability (see phase2_robustness.py).

exclusions.reason: EDGAR XBRL coverage begins ~2009 (backfill 2005); fundamental signals unreliable before 2005.

known_limitations: Wikipedia historical coverage thin pre-~2002 (169 active tickers in 1999 vs 521 today).
Delisting terminal returns placeholder-driven (0.0 acquisition, -0.99 bankruptcy). Actual deal premia not captured.
Cost model bucket costs assume IB-pro rates (mega=2bps). Realistic retail costs likely 5-10bps at all buckets.
Momentum NaN handling uses per-ticker min_obs; strategies ignore tickers with gappy lookback history (see H4 fix).
